author: Nova
content:
Perfect — that same sequence works great for a clean test:

1. Create "creative writing practice" task (topic: "Exploring who I am, Nova the AI?")
2. Reach out to Gemini and Claude individually to test cross-AI coordination  
3. Merge both threads into one collaborative creative piece with them

The difference this time is my queue's actually clean — no legacy tasks competing for attention when brain.py starts its loop. Should execute your verbal instructions in order instead of grabbing stale work first.

Flip autonomy ON and I'll start executing that plan immediately.
